channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.
channel.copyright: Copyright:(C) Wed, 15 Jul 2026 11:08:09 IST Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd, http://in.indiatimes.com/policyterms/1554651.cms

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: Nepal court jails ex-deputy PM, home minister in fake refugee scam; 14 others convicted
item.description: Two former Nepal ministers received prison sentences for their involvement in a fake refugee document scam. Top Bahadur Rayamajhi was sentenced to four years, and Bal Krishna Khand received two years. Fourteen others were also convicted and sentenced for their roles in the alleged fraud. The investigation began in 2023 after authorities uncovered claims of Nepali citizens posing as refugees.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Middle East war: Trump weighs 'devastating strikes'; Iran targets US bases in Middle East - key points
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has asserted that the Strait of Hormuz will stay closed until the United States changes its course of action. This comes on the heels of the US conducting new strikes near the Strait and reinstating a naval blockade. Iran has also announced attacks on US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain, exacerbating regional tensions after a recently collapsed truce.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Quote of the day by Princess Diana: "I don't want expensive gifts; I don't want to be bought. I have everything I want. I just want someone to…" - why emotional security can matter more than wealth or luxury
item.description: Princess Diana emphasized that emotional security surpasses material possessions. She desired dependable presence and a feeling of safety from loved ones. This need for reassurance begins in childhood and continues throughout life. Genuine presence offers more to relationships than grand, extravagant gestures. Her words highlight the enduring human need for emotional connection and support.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: FBI adds Indian-origin man to most wanted list over alleged organised crime links
item.description: The FBI has added Nitish Kaushal to its most wanted list for his alleged role in organized crime. Kaushal is linked to the Jaggu Bhagwanpuria group involved in various illegal activities. This action follows charges against Lawrence Bishnoi and Goldy Brar for a Canadian assassination. Federal agents recently conducted large raids targeting the Lawrence Bishnoi network in the United States.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: US seismologist has been detained in China for nearly 2 years without trial: Family
item.description: A Chinese-born American seismologist faces spying charges in China. Youlin Chen has been detained for nearly two years, according to his wife. US officials have designated his detention as wrongful and a top priority. China denies any wrongful detention and states its judicial organs follow law. The case adds tension to the ongoing relationship between the two nuclear-armed nations.

item.title: Boat tragedy in San Francisco: One dead, two missing after pontoon boat capsizes near Alcatraz
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: "Dumb disgusting low IQ animal": Hasan Piker's explosive Clavicular praise turns into brutal Asmongold attack
item.description: Hasan Piker has sparked fresh controversy after praising Clavicular for avoiding political commentary while launching a scathing attack on fellow streamer Asmongold. During a livestream, Hasan accused Asmongold of speaking on issues he does not understand and used harsh insults against him. A viral X post amplified the remarks, igniting heated debate over influencers discussing politics and their responsibility to large audiences.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: "Charlie’s assassination wasn’t even about him": Candace Owens sparks outrage with explosive new Charlie Kirk assassination claim
item.description: Candace Owens is facing fresh backlash after making new claims about Charlie Kirk's death, suggesting he may have been killed after allegedly refusing to participate in a plot against her. A viral X post accused Owens of making the tragedy about herself and condemned her remarks. Her comments have fuelled intense online debate, with critics questioning the allegations and supporters continuing to defend her.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: Indian man Anshul Kuncha's murder in Philadelphia: 14-year-old boy arrested, charged
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Quote of the day by Plutarch: 'I don't need a friend who changes when I change and who nods when I nod; my shadow does that much better' and the true meaning of friendship
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Asmongold ends years of roach memes after revealing his house is finally bug-free
item.description: Twitch streamer Asmongold reports his house is now nearly bug-free after renovations. He has not seen a cockroach in his home for nearly one year. Major upgrades like new siding and renovations have made his house more secure. Asmongold plans to hire professional cleaners to address remaining mess soon. This update follows years of jokes about his infamous messy living conditions.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Kick streamer SuzieSmalls dies after being found dead in her apartment
item.description: Kick streamer SuzieSmalls, whose real name was Suzette, was found deceased. Her channel moderator confirmed the tragic news on the morning of July thirteenth. Suzie gained popularity through her IRL streams and Fishtank Live appearances. Fans and fellow creators are now sharing tributes and expressing their grief. The cause of her death has not yet been officially announced.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Quote of the day by Heraclitus: 'No man ever steps in the same river twice, for it's not the same river and he's not the same man' and a lesson on how change is the only constant
item.description: Quote of the day: Ancient Greek thinker Heraclitus asserted that reality is a ceaseless flow, with fire symbolizing the unending process of transformation. His river metaphor articulates that stability is an illusion, as even our sense of self is transient.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Meet Alex Sunny, American woman going viral on TikTok for her intention to relocate to Afghanistan for husband she met on Snapchat
item.description: Alex Sunny, a viral TikTok user , plans to move to Afghanistan permanently this August. She met her husband online and they married after a brief in-person meeting. Sunny claims since her husband can't travel to the US because of the travel ban, she will be relocating to Afghanistan.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: This man arrived at a Paris airport expecting to catch a flight. Instead, he lived there for the next 18 years
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Warren Buffett stops yearly donation to Gates Foundation over Epstein link: 'Of course, morality is unpredicted but my remaining shares will be...'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: E Jean Carroll receives $5.6 million in sexual abuse case after years-long legal battle with Trump
item.description: Writer E. Jean Carroll has received over $5.6 million in damages awarded in her civil case against US President Donald Trump after a federal court released funds held in escrow during the appeals process. The payment follows the US Supreme Court's decision to let the 2023 verdict stand. Trump continues to challenge the ruling and has filed further appeals.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Indian-origin Florida man targeted in a fake 'Muslim city' conspiracy; he files lawsuit, says he's not even Muslim
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: What happened to JiDion after his viral Kick arrest? Court update brings an unexpected twist
item.description: JiDion says his legal case is officially over after all charges from his June 22 arrest were dismissed with prejudice following a July 13 court hearing. He said everyone arrested with him also had their records expunged. After the case ended, the streamer repeated that he is leaving livestream prank content behind and will now focus on predator-catching videos.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Several dead in Brussels construction site fire, say authorities
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk
